# FoodDelivery Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                     | Function Name         | HTTP Method | Template File        | Context Variables                                                                                                              | Dynamic Route Params                   |
|-------------------------------|-----------------------|-------------|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| /                             | root_redirect          | GET         | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /dashboard                    | dashboard             | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_restaurants (list of dict), each with: id (int), name (str), cuisine (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)        | None                                 |
| /restaurants                  | browse_restaurants    | GET         | restaurants.html      | restaurants (list of dict), each with: restaurant_id (int), name (str), cuisine (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)     | None                                 |
| /menu/<int:restaurant_id>  | restaurant_menu       | GET         | menu.html             | restaurant (dict): restaurant_id (int), name (str), address (str), phone (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)             |
|                               |                       |             |                      | menu_items (list of dict), each with: item_id (int), item_name (str), category (str), description (str), price (float), availability (int) | restaurant_id (int)                   |
| /item/<int:item_id>         | item_details          | GET         | item_details.html     | menu_item (dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), description (str), price (float), ingredients (str, optional if applicable)   | item_id (int)                        |
| /item/<int:item_id>/add   | add_item_to_cart      | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | item_id (int)                       |
| /cart                        | shopping_cart         | GET         | cart.html             | cart_items (list of dict), each with: item_id (int), item_name (str), quantity (int), price (float), subtotal (float)           |
|                               |                       |             |                      | total_amount (float)                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /cart/update                 | update_cart           | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /cart/remove/<int:item_id>  | remove_cart_item      | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | item_id (int)                       |
| /checkout                   | checkout_page         | GET         | checkout.html         | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /checkout/place_order        | place_order           | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /orders                     | active_orders         | GET         | active_orders.html    | orders (list of dict), each with: order_id (int), restaurant_name (str), status (str), eta (str)                                | None                                 |
| /orders/<int:order_id>/track | track_order          | GET         | track_order.html      | order (dict): order_id (int), customer_name (str), restaurant_id (int), order_date (str), total_amount (float), status (str), delivery_address (str), phone_number (str) | order_id (int)                      |
|                               |                       |             |                      | delivery (dict): delivery_id (int), driver_name (str), driver_phone (str), vehicle_info (str), status (str), estimated_time (str) |                                      |
|                               |                       |             |                      | order_items (list of dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), quantity (int), price (float)                                       |                                      |
| /reviews                    | reviews_page          | GET         | reviews.html          | reviews (list of dict), each with: review_id (int), restaurant_name (str), customer_name (str), rating (int), review_text (str), review_date (str) | None                                 |
| /reviews/write              | write_review          | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### dashboard.html
- File path: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Layout Overview: Main hub with featured restaurants and quick navigation buttons.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - dashboard-page (div)
  - featured-restaurants (div)
  - browse-restaurants-button (button)
  - view-cart-button (button)
  - active-orders-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - browse-restaurants-button → browse_restaurants (route: /restaurants)
  - view-cart-button → shopping_cart (route: /cart)
  - active-orders-button → active_orders (route: /orders)

### restaurants.html
- File path: templates/restaurants.html
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Search input, cuisine filter dropdown, restaurant cards grid.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - restaurants-page (div)
  - search-input (input)
  - cuisine-filter (dropdown/select)
  - restaurants-grid (div)
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'view-restaurant-button-3'
- Navigation mappings:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} → restaurant_menu (route: /menu/<restaurant_id>)

### menu.html
- File path: templates/menu.html
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Display restaurant info and menu items grid.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - menu-page (div)
  - restaurant-name (h1)
  - restaurant-info (div)
  - menu-items-grid (div)
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'add-to-cart-button-5'
  - view-item-details-{item_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'view-item-details-5'
- Navigation mappings:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} → add_item_to_cart (POST to /item/<item_id>/add)
  - view-item-details-{item_id} → item_details (route: /item/<item_id>)

### item_details.html
- File path: templates/item_details.html
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Detailed view of a single menu item.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - item-details-page (div)
  - item-name (h1)
  - item-description (div)
  - item-price (div)
  - quantity-input (input number)
  - add-to-cart-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - add-to-cart-button → add_item_to_cart (POST /item/<item_id>/add with quantity)

### cart.html
- File path: templates/cart.html
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Table of cart items with quantity update and removal.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - cart-page (div)
  - cart-items-table (table)
  - update-quantity-{item_id} (input number, dynamic) - e.g. 'update-quantity-3'
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'remove-item-button-3'
  - proceed-checkout-button (button)
  - total-amount (div)
- Navigation mappings:
  - proceed-checkout-button → checkout_page (route: /checkout)

### checkout.html
- File path: templates/checkout.html
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Form for delivery details and payment.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - checkout-page (div)
  - customer-name (input)
  - delivery-address (textarea)
  - phone-number (input)
  - payment-method (dropdown/select)
  - place-order-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - place-order-button → place_order (POST /checkout/place_order)

### active_orders.html
- File path: templates/active_orders.html
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Layout Overview: List of active orders with filters and tracking buttons.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - active-orders-page (div)
  - orders-list (div)
  - track-order-button-{order_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g., 'track-order-button-10'
  - status-filter (dropdown/select)
  - back-to-dashboard (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - track-order-button-{order_id} → track_order (route: /orders/<order_id>/track)
  - back-to-dashboard → dashboard (route: /dashboard)

### track_order.html
- File path: templates/track_order.html
- Page Title: Track Order
- Layout Overview: Detailed tracking info and delivery driver details.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - tracking-page (div)
  - order-details (div)
  - delivery-driver-info (div)
  - estimated-time (div)
  - order-items-list (div)
  - back-to-orders (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - back-to-orders → active_orders (route: /orders)

### reviews.html
- File path: templates/reviews.html
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Layout Overview: List of reviews with filter and button to write a review.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - reviews-page (div)
  - reviews-list (div)
  - write-review-button (button)
  - filter-by-rating (dropdown/select)
  - back-to-dashboard (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - write-review-button → write_review (route: /reviews/write, POST)
  - back-to-dashboard → dashboard (route: /dashboard)

---

## Section 3: Data Schemas

### 1. restaurants.txt
- File name: restaurants.txt
- Field order: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Purpose: Stores all restaurants with their essential details including cuisine, contact, rating, and order constraints.
- Data types & description:
  - restaurant_id: int
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: int (minutes)
  - min_order: float (e.g., minimum order amount in currency)
- Example rows:
  - 1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00
  - 2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00
  - 3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00

### 2. menus.txt
- File name: menus.txt
- Field order: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Purpose: Stores menu items for all restaurants with categories, descriptions, and availability status.
- Data types & description:
  - item_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: int (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1
  - 2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1
  - 3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1

### 3. cart.txt
- File name: cart.txt
- Field order: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Purpose: Stores current shopping cart items for users, tracking quantity and added date.
- Data types & description:
  - cart_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|2025-01-15
  - 2|3|2|1|2025-01-16

### 4. orders.txt
- File name: orders.txt
- Field order: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Purpose: Stores all orders placed with customer and delivery information and status tracking.
- Data types & description:
  - order_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: int
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example rows:
  - 1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234
  - 2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678

### 5. order_items.txt
- File name: order_items.txt
- Field order: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Purpose: Stores all items per order with quantities and price at order time.
- Data types & description:
  - order_item_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - price: float
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|12.99
  - 2|1|2|1|8.99
  - 3|2|3|1|14.99

### 6. deliveries.txt
- File name: deliveries.txt
- Field order: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Purpose: Tracks delivery info including driver details, status, and ETA.
- Data types & description:
  - delivery_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way)
  - estimated_time: datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
  - 2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30

### 7. reviews.txt
- File name: reviews.txt
- Field order: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Purpose: Stores customer reviews by restaurant with ratings and comments.
- Data types & description:
  - review_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: int (1 to 5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
  - 2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
  - 3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15

---

End of Design Specification

# FoodDelivery Web Application Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                     | Function Name         | HTTP Method | Template File        | Context Variables                                                                                                              | Dynamic Route Params                   |
|-------------------------------|-----------------------|-------------|----------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------|
| /                             | root_redirect          | GET         | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /dashboard                    | dashboard             | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_restaurants (list of dict), each with: id (int), name (str), cuisine (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)        | None                                 |
| /restaurants                  | browse_restaurants    | GET         | restaurants.html      | restaurants (list of dict), each with: restaurant_id (int), name (str), cuisine (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)     | None                                 |
| /menu/<int:restaurant_id>  | restaurant_menu       | GET         | menu.html             | restaurant (dict): restaurant_id (int), name (str), address (str), phone (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)             |
|                               |                       |             |                      | menu_items (list of dict), each with: item_id (int), item_name (str), category (str), description (str), price (float), availability (int) | restaurant_id (int)                   |
| /item/<int:item_id>         | item_details          | GET         | item_details.html     | menu_item (dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), description (str), price (float), ingredients (str, optional if applicable)   | item_id (int)                        |
| /item/<int:item_id>/add   | add_item_to_cart      | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | item_id (int)                       |
| /cart                        | shopping_cart         | GET         | cart.html             | cart_items (list of dict), each with: item_id (int), item_name (str), quantity (int), price (float), subtotal (float)           |
|                               |                       |             |                      | total_amount (float)                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /cart/update                 | update_cart           | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /cart/remove/<int:item_id>  | remove_cart_item      | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | item_id (int)                       |
| /checkout                   | checkout_page         | GET         | checkout.html         | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /checkout/place_order        | place_order           | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |
| /orders                     | active_orders         | GET         | active_orders.html    | orders (list of dict), each with: order_id (int), restaurant_name (str), status (str), eta (str)                                | None                                 |
| /orders/<int:order_id>/track | track_order          | GET         | track_order.html      | order (dict): order_id (int), customer_name (str), restaurant_id (int), order_date (str), total_amount (float), status (str), delivery_address (str), phone_number (str) | order_id (int)                      |
|                               |                       |             |                      | delivery (dict): delivery_id (int), driver_name (str), driver_phone (str), vehicle_info (str), status (str), estimated_time (str) |                                      |
|                               |                       |             |                      | order_items (list of dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), quantity (int), price (float)                                       |                                      |
| /reviews                    | reviews_page          | GET         | reviews.html          | reviews (list of dict), each with: review_id (int), restaurant_name (str), customer_name (str), rating (int), review_text (str), review_date (str) | None                                 |
| /reviews/write              | write_review          | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                          | None                                 |

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications

### dashboard.html
- File path: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Layout Overview: Main hub with featured restaurants and quick navigation buttons.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - dashboard-page (div)
  - featured-restaurants (div)
  - browse-restaurants-button (button)
  - view-cart-button (button)
  - active-orders-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - browse-restaurants-button → browse_restaurants (route: /restaurants)
  - view-cart-button → shopping_cart (route: /cart)
  - active-orders-button → active_orders (route: /orders)

### restaurants.html
- File path: templates/restaurants.html
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Search input, cuisine filter dropdown, restaurant cards grid.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - restaurants-page (div)
  - search-input (input)
  - cuisine-filter (dropdown/select)
  - restaurants-grid (div)
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'view-restaurant-button-3'
- Navigation mappings:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} → restaurant_menu (route: /menu/<restaurant_id>)

### menu.html
- File path: templates/menu.html
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Display restaurant info and menu items grid.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - menu-page (div)
  - restaurant-name (h1)
  - restaurant-info (div)
  - menu-items-grid (div)
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'add-to-cart-button-5'
  - view-item-details-{item_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'view-item-details-5'
- Navigation mappings:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} → add_item_to_cart (POST to /item/<item_id>/add)
  - view-item-details-{item_id} → item_details (route: /item/<item_id>)

### item_details.html
- File path: templates/item_details.html
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Detailed view of a single menu item.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - item-details-page (div)
  - item-name (h1)
  - item-description (div)
  - item-price (div)
  - quantity-input (input number)
  - add-to-cart-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - add-to-cart-button → add_item_to_cart (POST /item/<item_id>/add with quantity)

### cart.html
- File path: templates/cart.html
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Table of cart items with quantity update and removal.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - cart-page (div)
  - cart-items-table (table)
  - update-quantity-{item_id} (input number, dynamic) - e.g. 'update-quantity-3'
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g. 'remove-item-button-3'
  - proceed-checkout-button (button)
  - total-amount (div)
- Navigation mappings:
  - proceed-checkout-button → checkout_page (route: /checkout)

### checkout.html
- File path: templates/checkout.html
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Form for delivery details and payment.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - checkout-page (div)
  - customer-name (input)
  - delivery-address (textarea)
  - phone-number (input)
  - payment-method (dropdown/select)
  - place-order-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - place-order-button → place_order (POST /checkout/place_order)

### active_orders.html
- File path: templates/active_orders.html
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Layout Overview: List of active orders with filters and tracking buttons.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - active-orders-page (div)
  - orders-list (div)
  - track-order-button-{order_id} (button, dynamic) - e.g., 'track-order-button-10'
  - status-filter (dropdown/select)
  - back-to-dashboard (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - track-order-button-{order_id} → track_order (route: /orders/<order_id>/track)
  - back-to-dashboard → dashboard (route: /dashboard)

### track_order.html
- File path: templates/track_order.html
- Page Title: Track Order
- Layout Overview: Detailed tracking info and delivery driver details.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - tracking-page (div)
  - order-details (div)
  - delivery-driver-info (div)
  - estimated-time (div)
  - order-items-list (div)
  - back-to-orders (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - back-to-orders → active_orders (route: /orders)

### reviews.html
- File path: templates/reviews.html
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Layout Overview: List of reviews with filter and button to write a review.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - reviews-page (div)
  - reviews-list (div)
  - write-review-button (button)
  - filter-by-rating (dropdown/select)
  - back-to-dashboard (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - write-review-button → write_review (route: /reviews/write, POST)
  - back-to-dashboard → dashboard (route: /dashboard)

---

## Section 3: Data Schemas

### 1. restaurants.txt
- File name: restaurants.txt
- Field order: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Purpose: Stores all restaurants with their essential details including cuisine, contact, rating, and order constraints.
- Data types & description:
  - restaurant_id: int
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: int (minutes)
  - min_order: float (e.g., minimum order amount in currency)
- Example rows:
  - 1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00
  - 2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00
  - 3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00

### 2. menus.txt
- File name: menus.txt
- Field order: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Purpose: Stores menu items for all restaurants with categories, descriptions, and availability status.
- Data types & description:
  - item_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: int (1 for available, 0 for unavailable)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1
  - 2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1
  - 3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1

### 3. cart.txt
- File name: cart.txt
- Field order: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Purpose: Stores current shopping cart items for users, tracking quantity and added date.
- Data types & description:
  - cart_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|2025-01-15
  - 2|3|2|1|2025-01-16

### 4. orders.txt
- File name: orders.txt
- Field order: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Purpose: Stores all orders placed with customer and delivery information and status tracking.
- Data types & description:
  - order_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: int
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way, Preparing)
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example rows:
  - 1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234
  - 2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678

### 5. order_items.txt
- File name: order_items.txt
- Field order: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Purpose: Stores all items per order with quantities and price at order time.
- Data types & description:
  - order_item_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - price: float
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|12.99
  - 2|1|2|1|8.99
  - 3|2|3|1|14.99

### 6. deliveries.txt
- File name: deliveries.txt
- Field order: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Purpose: Tracks delivery info including driver details, status, and ETA.
- Data types & description:
  - delivery_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string (e.g., Delivered, On the Way)
  - estimated_time: datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
  - 2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30

### 7. reviews.txt
- File name: reviews.txt
- Field order: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Purpose: Stores customer reviews by restaurant with ratings and comments.
- Data types & description:
  - review_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: int (1 to 5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
  - 2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
  - 3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15

---

End of Design Specification

- Navigation mappings:
  - browse-restaurants-button  url_for('browse_restaurants') (route: /restaurants)
  - view-cart-button  url_for('shopping_cart') (route: /cart)
  - active-orders-button  url_for('active_orders') (route: /orders)

### restaurants.html
- File path: templates/restaurants.html
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Contains search input, cuisine dropdown filter and a grid displaying restaurant cards.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - restaurants-page (div)
  - search-input (input)
  - cuisine-filter (dropdown/select)
  - restaurants-grid (div)
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id} (button, dynamic per restaurant)
- Navigation mappings:
  - view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id}  url_for('restaurant_menu', restaurant_id=restaurant_id) (dynamic route)

### menu.html
- File path: templates/menu.html
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Displays the restaurant information and a grid of menu items with respective action buttons.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - menu-page (div)
  - restaurant-name (h1)
  - restaurant-info (div)
  - menu-items-grid (div)
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id} (button, dynamic)
  - view-item-details-{item_id} (button, dynamic)
- Navigation mappings:
  - add-to-cart-button-{item_id}  POST to url_for('add_item_to_cart', item_id=item_id)
  - view-item-details-{item_id}  url_for('item_details', item_id=item_id)

### item_details.html
- File path: templates/item_details.html
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Detailed item information page with quantity selector and add to cart action.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - item-details-page (div)
  - item-name (h1)
  - item-description (div)
  - item-price (div)
  - quantity-input (input number)
  - add-to-cart-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - add-to-cart-button  POST to url_for('add_item_to_cart', item_id=item_id) with quantity

### cart.html
- File path: templates/cart.html
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Table displaying cart items with update quantity and remove options. Shows total and checkout button.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - cart-page (div)
  - cart-items-table (table)
  - update-quantity-{item_id} (input number, dynamic)
  - remove-item-button-{item_id} (button, dynamic)
  - proceed-checkout-button (button)
  - total-amount (div)
- Navigation mappings:
  - proceed-checkout-button  url_for('checkout_page') (route: /checkout)

### checkout.html
- File path: templates/checkout.html
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Form for capturing customer delivery and payment details with place order button.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - checkout-page (div)
  - customer-name (input)
  - delivery-address (textarea)
  - phone-number (input)
  - payment-method (dropdown/select)
  - place-order-button (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - place-order-button  POST to url_for('place_order') (route: /checkout/place_order)

### active_orders.html
- File path: templates/active_orders.html
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Layout Overview: Lists current orders with status filter, each having button to track order details.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - active-orders-page (div)
  - orders-list (div)
  - track-order-button-{order_id} (button, dynamic)
  - status-filter (dropdown/select)
  - back-to-dashboard (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - track-order-button-{order_id}  url_for('track_order', order_id=order_id)
  - back-to-dashboard  url_for('dashboard')

### track_order.html
- File path: templates/track_order.html
- Page Title: Track Order
- Layout Overview: Complete order and delivery tracking details, with option to return to active orders.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - tracking-page (div)
  - order-details (div)
  - delivery-driver-info (div)
  - estimated-time (div)
  - order-items-list (div)
  - back-to-orders (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - back-to-orders  url_for('active_orders') (route: /orders)

### reviews.html
- File path: templates/reviews.html
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Layout Overview: Displays list of reviews with filters and navigation to write a new review.
- Element IDs & Types:
  - reviews-page (div)
  - reviews-list (div)
  - write-review-button (button)
  - filter-by-rating (dropdown/select)
  - back-to-dashboard (button)
- Navigation mappings:
  - write-review-button  url_for('write_review') (route: /reviews/write)
  - back-to-dashboard  url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data Schemas

### 1. restaurants.txt
- File Name: restaurants.txt
- Field order: restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order
- Purpose: Stores all restaurants with key details such as contact and ratings.
- Data Types:
  - restaurant_id: int
  - name: string
  - cuisine: string
  - address: string
  - phone: string
  - rating: float
  - delivery_time: int (minutes)
  - min_order: float
- Example rows:
  - 1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00
  - 2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00
  - 3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00

### 2. menus.txt
- File Name: menus.txt
- Field order: item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability
- Purpose: Contains menu items per restaurant with descriptions and availability.
- Data Types:
  - item_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - item_name: string
  - category: string
  - description: string
  - price: float
  - availability: int (1=available, 0=not available)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1
  - 2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1
  - 3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1

### 3. cart.txt
- File Name: cart.txt
- Field order: cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date
- Purpose: Stores shopping cart items with quantity and added date.
- Data Types:
  - cart_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - added_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|2025-01-15
  - 2|3|2|1|2025-01-16

### 4. orders.txt
- File Name: orders.txt
- Field order: order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number
- Purpose: Stores all orders with customer and delivery details.
- Data Types:
  - order_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - restaurant_id: int
  - order_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  - total_amount: float
  - status: string
  - delivery_address: string
  - phone_number: string
- Example rows:
  - 1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234
  - 2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678

### 5. order_items.txt
- File Name: order_items.txt
- Field order: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Purpose: Details of items in each order.
- Data Types:
  - order_item_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - price: float
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|12.99
  - 2|1|2|1|8.99
  - 3|2|3|1|14.99

### 6. deliveries.txt
- File Name: deliveries.txt
- Field order: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Purpose: Delivery tracking and driver info.
- Data Types:
  - delivery_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string
  - estimated_time: datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
  - 2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30

### 7. reviews.txt
- File Name: reviews.txt
- Field order: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Purpose: Customer reviews and ratings for restaurants.
- Data Types:
  - review_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: int (1 to 5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
  - 2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
  - 3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15

---

End of Design Specification

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                      | Function Name         | HTTP Method | Template File        | Context Variables                                                                                                                                                                     | Dynamic Route Params              |
|--------------------------------|-----------------------|-------------|----------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------|
| /                              | root_redirect          | GET         | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | None                            |
| /dashboard                     | dashboard             | GET         | dashboard.html        | featured_restaurants (list of dict): each dict fields: restaurant_id (int), name (str), cuisine (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)                                          | None                            |
| /restaurants                   | browse_restaurants    | GET         | restaurants.html      | restaurants (list of dict): each dict fields: restaurant_id (int), name (str), cuisine (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)                                                    | None                            |
| /menu/<int:restaurant_id>   | restaurant_menu       | GET         | menu.html             | restaurant (dict): restaurant_id (int), name (str), address (str), phone (str), rating (float), delivery_time (int)
menu_items (list of dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), category (str), description (str), price (float), availability (int) | restaurant_id (int)              |
| /item/<int:item_id>          | item_details          | GET         | item_details.html     | menu_item (dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), description (str), price (float), ingredients (str)                                                                                 | item_id (int)                   |
| /item/<int:item_id>/add      | add_item_to_cart      | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | item_id (int)                   |
| /cart                         | shopping_cart         | GET         | cart.html             | cart_items (list of dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), quantity (int), price (float), subtotal (float)
total_amount (float)                                                                                             | None                            |
| /cart/update                  | update_cart           | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | None                            |
| /cart/remove/<int:item_id>   | remove_cart_item      | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | item_id (int)                   |
| /checkout                    | checkout_page         | GET         | checkout.html         | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | None                            |
| /checkout/place_order         | place_order           | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | None                            |
| /orders                      | active_orders         | GET         | active_orders.html    | orders (list of dict): order_id (int), restaurant_name (str), status (str), eta (str)                                                                                                | None                            |
| /orders/<int:order_id>/track  | track_order          | GET         | track_order.html      | order (dict): order_id (int), customer_name (str), restaurant_id (int), order_date (str), total_amount (float), status (str), delivery_address (str), phone_number (str)
delivery (dict): delivery_id (int), driver_name (str), driver_phone (str), vehicle_info (str), status (str), estimated_time (str)
order_items (list of dict): item_id (int), item_name (str), quantity (int), price (float)                        | order_id (int)                 |
| /reviews                     | reviews_page          | GET         | reviews.html          | reviews (list of dict): review_id (int), restaurant_name (str), customer_name (str), rating (int), review_text (str), review_date (str)                                              | None                            |
| /reviews/write               | write_review          | POST        | N/A (redirect)        | None                                                                                                                                                                                 | None                            |

  - 2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678

### 5. order_items.txt
- File Name: order_items.txt
- Field order: order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price
- Purpose: Details of items in each order.
- Data Types:
  - order_item_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - item_id: int
  - quantity: int
  - price: float
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|1|2|12.99
  - 2|1|2|1|8.99
  - 3|2|3|1|14.99

### 6. deliveries.txt
- File Name: deliveries.txt
- Field order: delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time
- Purpose: Delivery tracking and driver info.
- Data Types:
  - delivery_id: int
  - order_id: int
  - driver_name: string
  - driver_phone: string
  - vehicle_info: string
  - status: string
  - estimated_time: datetime (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
  - 2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30

### 7. reviews.txt
- File Name: reviews.txt
- Field order: review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date
- Purpose: Customer reviews and ratings for restaurants.
- Data Types:
  - review_id: int
  - restaurant_id: int
  - customer_name: string
  - rating: int (1 to 5)
  - review_text: string
  - review_date: date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Example rows:
  - 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
  - 2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
  - 3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15

---

End of Design Specification

# SmartHomeManager Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Endpoint URL                | HTTP Methods | Function Name           | Template Rendered          | Context Variables (Name: Type)                          |
|-----------------------------|--------------|------------------------|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| /
| GET        | root_redirect          | *Redirects to /dashboard*| None                                                   |
| /dashboard                 | GET          | dashboard              | dashboard.html             | devices: list, rooms: list, device_counts: dict         |
| /devices                   | GET          | device_list            | device_list.html           | devices: list                                             |
| /devices/add               | GET, POST   | add_device             | add_device.html            | device_types: list[str], rooms: list[str], errors: dict (optional) |
| /device/<int:device_id>    | GET, POST   | device_control         | device_control.html        | device: dict, status: str                                 |
| /automation                | GET, POST   | automation_rules       | automation_rules.html      | rules: list, devices: list[str], errors: dict (optional) |
| /energy                   | GET, POST   | energy_report          | energy_report.html         | energy_logs: list, total_consumption: float, total_cost: float, filter_date: str (optional) |
| /activity                 | GET, POST   | activity_logs          | activity_logs.html         | activities: list, search_query: str (optional)           |
| /device/<int:device_id>/control | POST         | control_device_action  | None (Redirect)            | None                                                    |

---

### Explanation of Routes:

- **/** : Root redirect route to the dashboard page.
- **/dashboard** : Displays main dashboard overview with device summaries and room list.
- **/devices** : Lists all devices with quick control buttons.
- **/devices/add** : Form page to add a new device, handles GET for form display and POST for submission.
- **/device/<device_id>** : Device control page for a specific device, GET to display, POST to save control changes.
- **/automation** : Automation rules management page, GET to display, POST to add new rule.
- **/energy** : Energy report page, GET to display all or POST to apply date filter.
- **/activity** : Activity logs page, GET to display all or POST to apply search filters.
- **/device/<device_id>/control** : POST route to handle device control toggles submitted from device list quick control buttons.


## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Filepath: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Smart Home Dashboard

#### Element IDs:
- dashboard-page (Div): Container for dashboard page
- device-summary (Div): Summarizes total devices, active and offline counts
- device-list-button (Button): Navigate to device list (/devices)
- add-device-button (Button): Navigate to add device page (/devices/add)
- automation-button (Button): Navigate to automation rules page (/automation)
- energy-button (Button): Navigate to energy report page (/energy)
- activity-button (Button): Navigate to activity logs page (/activity)
- room-list (Div): Displays list of all rooms with device counts

#### Navigation Mappings:
- device-list-button: url_for('device_list')
- add-device-button: url_for('add_device')
- automation-button: url_for('automation_rules')
- energy-button: url_for('energy_report')
- activity-button: url_for('activity_logs')

---

### 2. Device List Page
- Filepath: templates/device_list.html
- Page Title: My Devices

#### Element IDs:
- device-list-page (Div): Container for device list page
- device-table (Table): Table displaying devices
- control-device-button-{device_id} (Button): Button to navigate to control page for each device
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- control-device-button-{device_id}: url_for('device_control', device_id=device_id)
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 3. Add Device Page
- Filepath: templates/add_device.html
- Page Title: Add New Device

#### Element IDs:
- add-device-page (Div): Container for add device page
- device-name (Input): Input for device name
- device-type (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Light, Thermostat, Camera, Lock, Sensor, Appliance
- device-room (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Bathroom, Garage
- submit-device-button (Button): Submit new device form
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 4. Device Control Page
- Filepath: templates/device_control.html
- Page Title: Device Control

#### Element IDs:
- device-control-page (Div): Container for device control page
- device-name-display (H2): Displays device name
- device-status-display (Div): Displays device status (Online/Offline)
- power-toggle (Button): Toggle device power on/off
- save-settings-button (Button): Save device settings
- back-to-devices (Button): Navigate back to device list (/devices)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-devices: url_for('device_list')

---

### 5. Automation Rules Page
- Filepath: templates/automation_rules.html
- Page Title: Automation Rules

#### Element IDs:
- automation-page (Div): Container for automation rules
- rules-table (Table): Table showing all automation rules
- rule-name (Input): Input for rule name
- trigger-type (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Time, Motion, Temperature
- trigger-value (Input): Input for trigger value
- action-device (Dropdown): Dropdown listing devices
- action-type (Dropdown): Options: Turn On, Turn Off, Set Brightness, Set Temperature
- add-rule-button (Button): Add new automation rule
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 6. Energy Report Page
- Filepath: templates/energy_report.html
- Page Title: Energy Report

#### Element IDs:
- energy-page (Div): Container for energy report page
- energy-summary (Div): Display total consumption and cost
- energy-table (Table): Table displaying energy consumption per device
- date-filter (Input[type=date]): Date filter input
- apply-filter-button (Button): Apply date filter
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 7. Activity Logs Page
- Filepath: templates/activity_logs.html
- Page Title: Activity Logs

#### Element IDs:
- activity-page (Div): Container for activity logs
- activity-table (Table): Table with logs
- search-activity (Input): Search input field
- apply-search-button (Button): Apply search filter
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

---

### 1. users.txt
- Path: data/users.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Username identifier
  2. email (str) - User email address

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|john@example.com
  jane_smith|jane@example.com
  ```

---

### 2. devices.txt
- Path: data/devices.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. device_id (int) - Unique device identifier
  3. device_name (str) - Device display name
  4. device_type (str) - Type of device (Light, Thermostat, etc.)
  5. room (str) - Room location
  6. brand (str) - Device brand
  7. model (str) - Device model
  8. status (str) - Device status (Online/Offline)
  9. power (str) - Power state (on/off)
  10. brightness (int or empty) - Brightness level (0-100) or empty if N/A
  11. temperature (int or empty) - Temperature setting or empty if N/A
  12. mode (str) - Mode setting (e.g., Auto, Manual, empty)
  13. schedule_time (str) - Scheduled time string or empty

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Living Room Light|Light|Living Room|Philips|Hue|Online|on|75|||Auto|
  john_doe|2|Bedroom Thermostat|Thermostat|Bedroom|Nest|Learning|Online|on||72|Auto|22:00
  jane_smith|3|Kitchen Camera|Camera|Kitchen|Ring|Indoor|Online|on||||Manual|
  ```

---

### 3. rooms.txt
- Path: data/rooms.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. room_id (int) - Unique room identifier
  3. room_name (str) - Name of the room

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Living Room
  john_doe|2|Bedroom
  john_doe|3|Kitchen
  jane_smith|1|Living Room
  ```

---

### 4. automation_rules.txt
- Path: data/automation_rules.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. rule_id (int) - Unique automation rule identifier
  3. rule_name (str) - Name of the automation rule
  4. trigger_type (str) - Trigger type (Time, Motion, Temperature)
  5. trigger_value (str) - Trigger value (e.g., time string, detected)
  6. action_device_id (int) - Target device ID for the action
  7. action_type (str) - Action type (Turn On, Turn Off, Set Brightness, Set Temperature)
  8. action_value (str) - Value for the action or empty
  9. enabled (bool as str) - 'true' or 'false' indicating rule active

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Morning Lights|Time|07:00|1|Turn On||true
  john_doe|2|Night Mode|Time|22:00|1|Set Brightness|20|true
  jane_smith|1|Motion Alert|Motion|detected|3|Turn On||true
  ```

---

### 5. energy_logs.txt
- Path: data/energy_logs.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. device_id (int) - Device identifier
  3. date (str, YYYY-MM-DD) - Date of consumption record
  4. consumption_kwh (float) - Energy consumption in kWh

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|2024-11-01|0.5
  john_doe|2|2024-11-01|2.3
  john_doe|1|2024-11-02|0.6
  jane_smith|3|2024-11-01|0.2
  ```

---

### 6. activity_logs.txt
- Path: data/activity_logs.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. timestamp (str, YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) - Timestamp of the activity
  3. device_id (int) - Id of the device
  4. action (str) - Action performed
  5. details (str) - Additional details about the action

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|2024-11-01 07:00:00|1|Power On|Automation triggered: Morning Lights
  john_doe|2024-11-01 08:30:00|2|Settings Changed|Temperature set to 72
  jane_smith|2024-11-01 09:15:00|3|Power On|Manual control
  ```

---

End of Design Specification

# SmartHomeManager Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Endpoint URL                | HTTP Methods | Function Name           | Template Rendered          | Context Variables (Name: Type)                          |
|-----------------------------|--------------|------------------------|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| /
| GET        | root_redirect          | *Redirects to /dashboard*| None                                                   |
| /dashboard                 | GET          | dashboard              | dashboard.html             | devices: list, rooms: list, device_counts: dict         |
| /devices                   | GET          | device_list            | device_list.html           | devices: list                                             |
| /devices/add               | GET, POST   | add_device             | add_device.html            | device_types: list[str], rooms: list[str], errors: dict (optional) |
| /device/<int:device_id>    | GET, POST   | device_control         | device_control.html        | device: dict, status: str                                 |
| /automation                | GET, POST   | automation_rules       | automation_rules.html      | rules: list, devices: list[str], errors: dict (optional) |
| /energy                   | GET, POST   | energy_report          | energy_report.html         | energy_logs: list, total_consumption: float, total_cost: float, filter_date: str (optional) |
| /activity                 | GET, POST   | activity_logs          | activity_logs.html         | activities: list, search_query: str (optional)           |
| /device/<int:device_id>/control | POST         | control_device_action  | None (Redirect)            | None                                                    |

---

### Explanation of Routes:

- **/** : Root redirect route to the dashboard page.
- **/dashboard** : Displays main dashboard overview with device summaries and room list.
- **/devices** : Lists all devices with quick control buttons.
- **/devices/add** : Form page to add a new device, handles GET for form display and POST for submission.
- **/device/<device_id>** : Device control page for a specific device, GET to display, POST to save control changes.
- **/automation** : Automation rules management page, GET to display, POST to add new rule.
- **/energy** : Energy report page, GET to display all or POST to apply date filter.
- **/activity** : Activity logs page, GET to display all or POST to apply search filters.
- **/device/<device_id>/control** : POST route to handle device control toggles submitted from device list quick control buttons.


## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Filepath: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Smart Home Dashboard

#### Element IDs:
- dashboard-page (Div): Container for dashboard page
- device-summary (Div): Summarizes total devices, active and offline counts
- device-list-button (Button): Navigate to device list (/devices)
- add-device-button (Button): Navigate to add device page (/devices/add)
- automation-button (Button): Navigate to automation rules page (/automation)
- energy-button (Button): Navigate to energy report page (/energy)
- activity-button (Button): Navigate to activity logs page (/activity)
- room-list (Div): Displays list of all rooms with device counts

#### Navigation Mappings:
- device-list-button: url_for('device_list')
- add-device-button: url_for('add_device')
- automation-button: url_for('automation_rules')
- energy-button: url_for('energy_report')
- activity-button: url_for('activity_logs')

---

### 2. Device List Page
- Filepath: templates/device_list.html
- Page Title: My Devices

#### Element IDs:
- device-list-page (Div): Container for device list page
- device-table (Table): Table displaying devices
- control-device-button-{device_id} (Button): Button to navigate to control page for each device
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- control-device-button-{device_id}: url_for('device_control', device_id=device_id)
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 3. Add Device Page
- Filepath: templates/add_device.html
- Page Title: Add New Device

#### Element IDs:
- add-device-page (Div): Container for add device page
- device-name (Input): Input for device name
- device-type (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Light, Thermostat, Camera, Lock, Sensor, Appliance
- device-room (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Bathroom, Garage
- submit-device-button (Button): Submit new device form
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 4. Device Control Page
- Filepath: templates/device_control.html
- Page Title: Device Control

#### Element IDs:
- device-control-page (Div): Container for device control page
- device-name-display (H2): Displays device name
- device-status-display (Div): Displays device status (Online/Offline)
- power-toggle (Button): Toggle device power on/off
- save-settings-button (Button): Save device settings
- back-to-devices (Button): Navigate back to device list (/devices)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-devices: url_for('device_list')

---

### 5. Automation Rules Page
- Filepath: templates/automation_rules.html
- Page Title: Automation Rules

#### Element IDs:
- automation-page (Div): Container for automation rules
- rules-table (Table): Table showing all automation rules
- rule-name (Input): Input for rule name
- trigger-type (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Time, Motion, Temperature
- trigger-value (Input): Input for trigger value
- action-device (Dropdown): Dropdown listing devices
- action-type (Dropdown): Options: Turn On, Turn Off, Set Brightness, Set Temperature
- add-rule-button (Button): Add new automation rule
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 6. Energy Report Page
- Filepath: templates/energy_report.html
- Page Title: Energy Report

#### Element IDs:
- energy-page (Div): Container for energy report page
- energy-summary (Div): Display total consumption and cost
- energy-table (Table): Table displaying energy consumption per device
- date-filter (Input[type=date]): Date filter input
- apply-filter-button (Button): Apply date filter
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 7. Activity Logs Page
- Filepath: templates/activity_logs.html
- Page Title: Activity Logs

#### Element IDs:
- activity-page (Div): Container for activity logs
- activity-table (Table): Table with logs
- search-activity (Input): Search input field
- apply-search-button (Button): Apply search filter
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Navigate back to dashboard (/dashboard)

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

---

### 1. users.txt
- Path: data/users.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Username identifier
  2. email (str) - User email address

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|john@example.com
  jane_smith|jane@example.com
  ```

---

### 2. devices.txt
- Path: data/devices.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. device_id (int) - Unique device identifier
  3. device_name (str) - Device display name
  4. device_type (str) - Type of device (Light, Thermostat, etc.)
  5. room (str) - Room location
  6. brand (str) - Device brand
  7. model (str) - Device model
  8. status (str) - Device status (Online/Offline)
  9. power (str) - Power state (on/off)
  10. brightness (int or empty) - Brightness level (0-100) or empty if N/A
  11. temperature (int or empty) - Temperature setting or empty if N/A
  12. mode (str) - Mode setting (e.g., Auto, Manual, empty)
  13. schedule_time (str) - Scheduled time string or empty

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Living Room Light|Light|Living Room|Philips|Hue|Online|on|75|||Auto|
  john_doe|2|Bedroom Thermostat|Thermostat|Bedroom|Nest|Learning|Online|on||72|Auto|22:00
  jane_smith|3|Kitchen Camera|Camera|Kitchen|Ring|Indoor|Online|on||||Manual|
  ```

---

### 3. rooms.txt
- Path: data/rooms.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. room_id (int) - Unique room identifier
  3. room_name (str) - Name of the room

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Living Room
  john_doe|2|Bedroom
  john_doe|3|Kitchen
  jane_smith|1|Living Room
  ```

---

### 4. automation_rules.txt
- Path: data/automation_rules.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. rule_id (int) - Unique automation rule identifier
  3. rule_name (str) - Name of the automation rule
  4. trigger_type (str) - Trigger type (Time, Motion, Temperature)
  5. trigger_value (str) - Trigger value (e.g., time string, detected)
  6. action_device_id (int) - Target device ID for the action
  7. action_type (str) - Action type (Turn On, Turn Off, Set Brightness, Set Temperature)
  8. action_value (str) - Value for the action or empty
  9. enabled (bool as str) - 'true' or 'false' indicating rule active

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Morning Lights|Time|07:00|1|Turn On||true
  john_doe|2|Night Mode|Time|22:00|1|Set Brightness|20|true
  jane_smith|1|Motion Alert|Motion|detected|3|Turn On||true
  ```

---

### 5. energy_logs.txt
- Path: data/energy_logs.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. device_id (int) - Device identifier
  3. date (str, YYYY-MM-DD) - Date of consumption record
  4. consumption_kwh (float) - Energy consumption in kWh

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|2024-11-01|0.5
  john_doe|2|2024-11-01|2.3
  john_doe|1|2024-11-02|0.6
  jane_smith|3|2024-11-01|0.2
  ```

---

### 6. activity_logs.txt
- Path: data/activity_logs.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owner username
  2. timestamp (str, YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) - Timestamp of the activity
  3. device_id (int) - Id of the device
  4. action (str) - Action performed
  5. details (str) - Additional details about the action

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|2024-11-01 07:00:00|1|Power On|Automation triggered: Morning Lights
  john_doe|2024-11-01 08:30:00|2|Settings Changed|Temperature set to 72
  jane_smith|2024-11-01 09:15:00|3|Power On|Manual control
  ```

---

End of Design Specification

log.before:
# SmartHomeManager Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification

| Endpoint URL                | HTTP Methods | Function Name           | Template Rendered          | Context Variables (Name: Type)                          |
|----------------------------|--------------|------------------------|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| /                          | GET          | root_redirect          | None (Redirect to /dashboard) | None                                                  |
| /dashboard                 | GET          | dashboard              | dashboard.html             | devices: list, rooms: list, device_counts: dict        |
| /devices                   | GET          | device_list            | device_list.html           | devices: list                                          |
| /devices/add               | GET, POST    | add_device             | add_device.html            | device_types: list[str], rooms: list[str], errors: dict (optional) |
| /device/<int:device_id>    | GET, POST    | device_control         | device_control.html        | device: dict, status: str                              |
| /automation                | GET, POST    | automation_rules       | automation_rules.html      | rules: list, devices: list[str], errors: dict (optional) |
| /energy                   | GET, POST    | energy_report          | energy_report.html         | energy_logs: list, total_consumption: float, total_cost: float, filter_date: str (optional) |
| /activity                 | GET, POST    | activity_logs          | activity_logs.html         | activities: list, search_query: str (optional)         |

---

## Section 2: HTML Templates Specification

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Filepath: templates/dashboard.html
- Page Title: Smart Home Dashboard

#### Element IDs:
- dashboard-page (Div): Container for the dashboard page
- device-summary (Div): Summary showing total devices, active devices, and offline devices count
- device-list-button (Button): Button to navigate to device list page
- add-device-button (Button): Button to navigate to add device page
- automation-button (Button): Button to navigate to automation rules page
- energy-button (Button): Button to navigate to energy report page
- activity-button (Button): Button to navigate to activity logs page
- room-list (Div): List of all rooms with device counts displayed

#### Navigation Mappings:
- device-list-button: url_for('device_list')
- add-device-button: url_for('add_device')
- automation-button: url_for('automation_rules')
- energy-button: url_for('energy_report')
- activity-button: url_for('activity_logs')

---

### 2. Device List Page
- Filepath: templates/device_list.html
- Page Title: My Devices

#### Element IDs:
- device-list-page (Div): Container for the device list page
- device-table (Table): Table displaying all devices (name, type, room, status, actions)
- control-device-button-{device_id} (Button): Button to navigate to device control page (dynamic: device_id as int)
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard

#### Navigation Mappings:
- control-device-button-{device_id}: url_for('device_control', device_id=device_id)
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 3. Add Device Page
- Filepath: templates/add_device.html
- Page Title: Add New Device

#### Element IDs:
- add-device-page (Div): Container for add device page
- device-name (Input): Input field for device name
- device-type (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Light, Thermostat, Camera, Lock, Sensor, Appliance
- device-room (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Living Room, Bedroom, Kitchen, Bathroom, Garage
- submit-device-button (Button): Button to submit new device
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 4. Device Control Page
- Filepath: templates/device_control.html
- Page Title: Device Control

#### Element IDs:
- device-control-page (Div): Container for device control page
- device-name-display (H2): Display device name
- device-status-display (Div): Display current device status (Online/Offline)
- power-toggle (Button): Button to toggle device power on/off
- save-settings-button (Button): Button to save device settings
- back-to-devices (Button): Button to navigate back to device list

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-devices: url_for('device_list')

---

### 5. Automation Rules Page
- Filepath: templates/automation_rules.html
- Page Title: Automation Rules

#### Element IDs:
- automation-page (Div): Container for automation rules page
- rules-table (Table): Table displaying all automation rules (name, trigger, action, status)
- rule-name (Input): Input field for rule name
- trigger-type (Dropdown): Dropdown with options: Time, Motion, Temperature
- trigger-value (Input): Input field for trigger value
- action-device (Dropdown): Dropdown to select target device
- action-type (Dropdown): Dropdown options: Turn On, Turn Off, Set Brightness, Set Temperature
- add-rule-button (Button): Button to add new automation rule
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 6. Energy Report Page
- Filepath: templates/energy_report.html
- Page Title: Energy Report

#### Element IDs:
- energy-page (Div): Container for energy report page
- energy-summary (Div): Summary showing total energy consumption and cost estimate
- energy-table (Table): Table displaying energy consumption per device with date and kWh
- date-filter (Input[type="date"]): Date filter input
- apply-filter-button (Button): Button to apply date filter
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

### 7. Activity Logs Page
- Filepath: templates/activity_logs.html
- Page Title: Activity Logs

#### Element IDs:
- activity-page (Div): Container for activity logs page
- activity-table (Table): Table displaying activity logs (timestamp, device, action, details)
- search-activity (Input): Input field to search activity logs
- apply-search-button (Button): Button to apply search filter
- back-to-dashboard (Button): Button to navigate back to dashboard

#### Navigation Mappings:
- back-to-dashboard: url_for('dashboard')

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas

### 1. users.txt
- Path: data/users.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - User's unique username
  2. email (str) - User's email address

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|john@example.com
  jane_smith|jane@example.com
  ```

---

### 2. devices.txt
- Path: data/devices.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owning user's username
  2. device_id (int) - Unique device identifier
  3. device_name (str) - Device display name
  4. device_type (str) - Device type (e.g., Light, Thermostat)
  5. room (str) - Room name where device is located
  6. brand (str) - Device brand
  7. model (str) - Device model
  8. status (str) - Device status (Online/Offline)
  9. power (str) - Power status (on/off)
  10. brightness (int or empty) - Brightness level (0-100) or empty if not applicable
  11. temperature (int or empty) - Temperature setting or empty if not applicable
  12. mode (str) - Mode setting (Auto, Manual, or empty)
  13. schedule_time (str) - Scheduled time or empty

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Living Room Light|Light|Living Room|Philips|Hue|Online|on|75|||Auto|
  john_doe|2|Bedroom Thermostat|Thermostat|Bedroom|Nest|Learning|Online|on||72|Auto|22:00
  jane_smith|3|Kitchen Camera|Camera|Kitchen|Ring|Indoor|Online|on||||Manual|
  ```

---

### 3. rooms.txt
- Path: data/rooms.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owning user's username
  2. room_id (int) - Unique room identifier
  3. room_name (str) - Name of the room

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Living Room
  john_doe|2|Bedroom
  john_doe|3|Kitchen
  jane_smith|1|Living Room
  ```

---

### 4. automation_rules.txt
- Path: data/automation_rules.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owning user's username
  2. rule_id (int) - Unique rule identifier
  3. rule_name (str) - Name of the rule
  4. trigger_type (str) - Trigger type (Time, Motion, Temperature)
  5. trigger_value (str) - Trigger value (e.g., time or motion detected)
  6. action_device_id (int) - ID of target device
  7. action_type (str) - Action type (Turn On, Turn Off, Set Brightness, Set Temperature)
  8. action_value (str) - Value for the action or empty
  9. enabled (str) - 'true' or 'false' for rule status

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|Morning Lights|Time|07:00|1|Turn On||true
  john_doe|2|Night Mode|Time|22:00|1|Set Brightness|20|true
  jane_smith|1|Motion Alert|Motion|detected|3|Turn On||true
  ```

---

### 5. energy_logs.txt
- Path: data/energy_logs.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owning user's username
  2. device_id (int) - Device identifier
  3. date (str) - Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
  4. consumption_kwh (float) - Energy consumption in kilowatt-hours

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|1|2024-11-01|0.5
  john_doe|2|2024-11-01|2.3
  john_doe|1|2024-11-02|0.6
  jane_smith|3|2024-11-01|0.2
  ```

---

### 6. activity_logs.txt
- Path: data/activity_logs.txt
- Fields (pipe-delimited):
  1. username (str) - Owning user's username
  2. timestamp (str) - Timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format
  3. device_id (int) - Device ID
  4. action (str) - Action performed
  5. details (str) - Additional details

- Example Lines:
  ```
  john_doe|2024-11-01 07:00:00|1|Power On|Automation triggered: Morning Lights
  john_doe|2024-11-01 08:30:00|2|Settings Changed|Temperature set to 72
  jane_smith|2024-11-01 09:15:00|3|Power On|Manual control
  ```

---

End of Design Specification
